name: cream vinaigrette
instructions: whisk white wine vinegar, heavy whipping cream, and raw minced garlic together.
notes:
Garlic stays raw.

ACID: white wine vinegar. Lemon juice was previously listed as a substitute but after making this a few times it isn't as good — the lemon reads brighter and slightly sweeter and pulls the dressing away from the sharp, traditionally french-vinaigrette register that's the whole point. Stick with white wine vinegar.
